# Diablo4Storage.IsParagonTextureHandle method

The structural "is a real atlas texture handle" test (FR-C9): handle-magnitude (≥ `0x10000` — D4 handles are 32-bit hashes; smaller atlas-resolving values are field ints/enums, never bindings) and resolvable via the icon catalog. Used by the typed projection, the exhaustive model, and the coverage gate so all three share one sound definition.

```csharp
public bool IsParagonTextureHandle(uint handle)
```
